name: 3D Card Effect
summary: A 3D Card Effect card component for showcasing features, testimonials, and product content with visual polish.
detailedDescription: 3D Card Effect is a reusable card component designed to help teams compose polished UI sections faster without rebuilding common interaction patterns from scratch. It works by combining Tailwind-driven styling with composable React structure, and in many setups it can be paired with utility props and class overrides for project-specific branding. It is best suited for 3d-effects, cards contexts where clear visual hierarchy matters. Visually, it feels visually dominant and can act as either a supporting accent or a focal element depending on spacing, color contrast, and surrounding content density. It typically relies on motion-driven transitions and timing curves to feel alive and premium. It combines well with complementary navigation, hero, card, and typography primitives, but should be used carefully to avoid animation overload, accessibility conflicts, or unnecessary performance cost on low-powered devices.
purpose: Group related content into digestible visual blocks
Highlight features, testimonials, or product capabilities
Increase engagement through interaction and motion
behavior: Responds to pointer hover and movement with visual feedback
recommendations: Use as a focal animated accent and pair with calmer surrounding components.
Pairs well with testimonials, feature grids, and product highlight sections.
